programme.title: E221 - Vandal! / Tumbles, Where Did You Go?

programme.title: E101 - Catch The Quickatoo / Lost Lorito
programme.desc: Abuela shows Dora her photo album of birds, with one page blank: the Quickatoo. Dora vows to find the Quickatoo and get a picture to complete the album. // Dora and Boots help a baby parrot named Lorito find his Mami, but he can't stop copying Boots!

programme.title: E106 - Spaceland / New Rocket / Babysitting
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia get lost at a play centre. // Tim tries to find a new rocket that's perfect for him. // Tim tries to bend all the rules when Terri comes to babysit.

programme.title: E401 - The Crew Builds A Fancy Drive-Thru Restaurant / The Crew Builds A Castle Sh
programme.desc: When Camila the truck driver needs a place to stop and eat, the pups and Cafe Carl have a fancy idea. But is it too fancy? // Park Ranger Rose and Rosie the goat are putting on a show! But when Rosie disappears, can the pups find her before showtime?

programme.desc: Sid Swashbuckle pretends to be a legendary ghost so that he can take Danny's new skateboard. // Ryder and the Pups race to save Mayor Goodway's Glow-in-the-Dark Party guests when a frightened Alien Boy zaps them into floating space bubbles.

programme.title: E7 - Freaky Gwen Ben

programme.title: E13 - Don't Let The Bass Drop
programme.desc: Ben and Gwen are excited to attend an Earth Day EDM concert in Portland until the show is hijacked by the sound-manipulating baddy, Lord Decibel, who uses sound as a weapon to trash the planet.

programme.title: E14 - The Tao Of Macau
programme.desc: The day has come when the final four chefs must cook with the world's smelliest fruit durian. This infamous fruit is a delicacy in Macau, but will Padma and guest judge, James Beard Award winner Abe Conlon be able to stomach their creations for the season's last Quickfire? Then, the chefs get a tutorial in the traditional cuisine of Macau, a fusion of Chinese and Portuguese flavors, and are joined by their family members from back home. For the elimination challenge, the chefs are tasked with blending their own heritage with Chinese flavors in order to impress their love ones and the judges, in order to earn their spot in the finale.

programme.title: E94
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. programme.title: E16 - Pierre Dubreuil, Veronique Briday
programme.desc: The different attitudes and approaches of French farmers in terms of the environment, economy and landscape. A practical way of understanding a region and its terroir through their working practices.

programme.title: E6 - Ready-To-Wear Fashion Shows/Ai In Fashion/Le Chemin Des Maquettes
programme.desc: A look back at the ready-to-wear shows for Autumn-Winter 2025-2026 from Mossi Traore to Paco Rabanne and Enfants Riches Deprimes. AI is making its mark in fashion as stylists, art directors and clothing designers. Le Chemin des Maquettes makes metal fashion pieces for some of the world's top designers.

programme.title: E1 - Les Retros Du Plateau
programme.desc: In the grounds of Harcourt Castle, Laurent meets Les Retros du plateau, one of the largest car clubs in Normandy. Jimmy Quetel, official BMW driver, presents Michel with a rare model from the 1960s: the BMW 700S.

programme.title: E6 - Natural Beekeeping
programme.desc: Honey, royal jelly, pollen, wax: since ancient times, bees have collected and transformed these products full of virtues. They are found in daily life, in dietary supplements, and in cosmetic formulations. A journey to discover this sector, from the Marquesas Islands to Tahiti.

programme.title: E13 - Weinsanto
programme.desc: Humour, fantasy and a flair for the spectacular all describe Victor Weinsanto's designs. He presents his autumn-winter 2023-2024 ready to wear show.

programme.title: E6 - Vesunna/Wendy Andreu/Alainpaul
programme.desc: A 4,000 square metre domus at the Vesunna Gallo-Roman Museum in Perigueux. Wendy Andreu structures each material with the same interest in creating unique objects. Have a look at African life and find out what is going on there in the sphere of politics, health care, business. Get to know how global affairs influence its top events and be the first to experience its colorful exotic culture.

programme.title: E38 - Mayor Stan
programme.desc: Myrtle declares Stanley Mayor for a day. He soon finds there is a dance class and new barn to open with lots of ribbon cutting, and he even fits in making a Bowling alley.

programme.title: E47 - Cricket
programme.desc: During a friendly game of neighbourhood cricket, the dads struggle to bowl Rusty out.

programme.title: E2 - Obstacle Course
programme.desc: Chilli sets up an obstacle course in the backyard, but Bluey is disheartened when Bandit turns it into a race and beats her. After cheating in a rematch, Bluey discovers the importance of training in order to improve her skills.

programme.title: E15 - Parsnip
programme.desc: Parsnip performs a jaw dropping escape that will leave even Houdini speechless.

programme.title: E52 - Broccoli's Movie Night
programme.desc: Broccoli screens Supertato: The Movie, but Evil Pea has plans to change the story.

programme.title: E9 - Lizard
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'lizard' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. Today we see a green lizard, a bright lizard, a long-tailed lizard, a running lizard and a climbing lizard.

programme.title: E6 - Mini Bluey
programme.desc: When Dad complains about how dissimilar Bluey and Bingo are, Bluey hatches a plan to make them more alike and happily introduces Mini-Bluey!

programme.title: E31 - Go Jet Academy: Lightning Bolt Blackout
programme.desc: When lightning strikes Academy Island, it causes a power cut. Can the Go Jetters rescue their trapped friends without the power they need to call for Click-ons?

programme.title: E51 - Daddy Putdown
programme.desc: When Mum goes out to a baby shower, Dad takes charge of the girls' evening routine. But with Bluey missing Mum, Dad has to pull out all the games he knows to keep them entertained.

programme.title: E25 - The Going Slow Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels are rushing around, so Duggee shows them how to take a slower pace.

programme.title: E37 - Kinderdijk, Netherlands
programme.desc: The Go Jetters travel to Kinderdijk in The Netherlands to celebrate National Mill Day.

programme.title: E22 - Mines Of Mystery
programme.desc: Amidst Italy's ancient sites and hidden treasures, Thomas is inspired to make his own special discovery and goes on a journey to find a lost legend.

programme.title: E25 - The Going Slow Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels are rushing around, so Duggee shows them how to take a slower pace.

programme.title: E37 - Kinderdijk, Netherlands
programme.desc: The Go Jetters travel to Kinderdijk in The Netherlands to celebrate National Mill Day.

programme.title: E22 - Mines Of Mystery
programme.desc: Amidst Italy's ancient sites and hidden treasures, Thomas is inspired to make his own special discovery and goes on a journey to find a lost legend.

programme.title: E38 - Mayor Stan
programme.desc: Myrtle declares Stanley Mayor for a day. He soon finds there is a dance class and new barn to open with lots of ribbon cutting, and he even fits in making a Bowling alley.

programme.title: E6 - It's Time To Bake
programme.desc: Gran Gran and JoJo are excited to bake a batch of Great Gran Gran's signature Saint Lucian banana bread, but there's a problem - they don't know how long to bake it for!

programme.title: E2 - Obstacle Course
programme.desc: Chilli sets up an obstacle course in the backyard, but Bluey is disheartened when Bandit turns it into a race and beats her. After cheating in a rematch, Bluey discovers the importance of training in order to improve her skills.

programme.title: E3 - Promises
programme.desc: Bluey keeps breaking her promises! But after seeing how much Bingo trusts Mum's word, Bluey learns the power of promises and why it's important not to break them.

programme.title: E16 - Mariana Trench: The Pacific Ocean
programme.desc: With the help of his hero Ron Allum, Lars plans to dive to the bottom of the Mariana Trench in a submersible called the Deep Sea Challenger.

programme.desc: It's Broccoli and his floret, Broc, performing their phenomenal ventriloquist act.

programme.desc: Broccoli screens Supertato: The Movie, but Evil Pea has plans to change the story.

programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. programme.title: E25
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: News Of Shenzhen
programme.desc: Presented as a leisurely variety show, the program revolves around the theme: 'Seek Paradise Along the Journey to Kunlun Mountain.' Throughout their travels, the adventurers will uncover lesser-known towns, each exuding its own unique charm. They will explore the distinctive characteristics of these hidden gems, savoring every street and lane, as well as every bite and sip. This immersive experience seeks to rediscover the essence of life, allowing our weary hearts to shine anew amidst the dust of daily grind.

E2 - Cody Is a Good Brother & a Good Friend
programme.desc: Join Cody as he learns how to be a good brother & a good friend! In a heartwarming moment, Cody finds out he's going to be a big brother. After some initial nerves, he spends a special day with his mama & her baby bump. Then, the big day arrives as the family brings his new sister, Kendi, home! Watch Cody take on his new role, helping Kendi get to sleep & learning to play new games together like bouncing a balloon.

programme.title: E2 - Drawing, Painting, Music & A Quick Fix!
programme.desc: The Minibods are having a day of drawing, painting, music & a quick fix! Newt is drawing a beautiful flower but keeps rushing & crumpling her drawings, so she must learn to slow down. Then, when the Minibods help her finish a huge painting, Newt wants it all for herself! The creative chaos continues as Lulu struggles to make a music video with a marching Oddbird & Bubbles accidentally makes a mess while trying to fix a book dispenser.

programme.title: E2 - Little Problems, Big Adventures!
programme.desc: Mila & Morphle are turning little problems into big adventures! When Mr. Vanderboos accidentally sprays hair growth serum on Daddy, Officer Freeze mistakes him for a hairy monster, & a wild chase begins! Then, Mila has a bad cold, but she still has to help Morphle figure out the right morphs to rescue a dog stuck in a tree. From playing a quiet game to avoid waking a napping neighbor to playing hide & seek with friends, every little problem is a big adventure!

programme.title: E10 - Mindful Bedtime Lullabies
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E1 - A Day of Food, Play & Learning!
programme.desc: Join the kids for a day of food, play & learning! First, Grandma Panda bakes some cupcakes while Mia & Bari role-play as bakers in their own pretend kitchen & play a game of pat-a-cake. Then, it's time for a teddy bear's picnic with a whole variety of different tasty treats! The learning continues as Daddy & Twinkle show Max how to say hello with a wave before going into town to wave hello to all their friends. It's a fun-filled, yummy day!

programme.title: E2 - Drawing, Painting, Music & A Quick Fix!
programme.desc: The Minibods are having a day of drawing, painting, music & a quick fix! Newt is drawing a beautiful flower but keeps rushing & crumpling her drawings, so she must learn to slow down. Then, when the Minibods help her finish a huge painting, Newt wants it all for herself! The creative chaos continues as Lulu struggles to make a music video with a marching Oddbird & Bubbles accidentally makes a mess while trying to fix a book dispenser.

programme.title: E3 - Baby John is a Great Big Brother!
programme.desc: Baby John is learning how to be a great big brother & a good friend! When Mom needs a nap, Jack & Jill decide to help by taking care of their little brother. Then, Baby John learns how to be a friend to everyone by sharing, working together & including everyone in play. Baby John also shows he has a great role model, because he loves his big brother Jack & wants to be just like him, following him around & copying everything he does!

programme.title: E5 - Baby John's Big Outdoor Adventures!
programme.desc: Get ready for some big outdoor adventures with Baby John! First, Dad makes sure the family is prepared with the proper clothes, first aid & food. Then, the family enters a sandcastle competition, where Baby John, Jack & Jill work together to build a giant sand turtle! The fun continues as the family goes camping, but nighttime is a little scary! Mom & Dad show the kids there's nothing to be afraid of, especially with the beautiful stars to look at!

programme.title: E2 - Cody Is a Good Brother & a Good Friend
programme.desc: Join Cody as he learns how to be a good brother & a good friend! In a heartwarming moment, Cody finds out he's going to be a big brother. After some initial nerves, he spends a special day with his mama & her baby bump. Then, the big day arrives as the family brings his new sister, Kendi, home! Watch Cody take on his new role, helping Kendi get to sleep & learning to play new games together like bouncing a balloon.

programme.title: E1 - Battling Evil Robots & Racing Villains!
programme.desc: Get ready for an action-packed day of battling evil robots & racing villains! First, the new & improved Robofreeze becomes faulty, & Mila & Morphle must help Officer Freeze retrieve the remote to turn him off! Then, it's time for the Pet Port Rally, but naughty Winston cheats by using sneaky devices to slow everyone down. The chaos continues as two Robofreezes turn evil & multiply, & a lightning strike turns another one into a super-powered menace!

programme.title: E1 - Game Day Goofs & Grandma's Fixes!
programme.desc: Get ready for game day goofs & Grandma's amazing fixes! The fun starts with a basketball game, but when Max the Monster Truck tries a slam dunk, he breaks his suspension & gets a teddy bear stuck in the hoop! Then, when Gecko gets a boo boo while trying to fix Bobby the Bus's mixed-up controls, Grandma Gecko arrives just in time to help with the repair. The day ends with Grandma's own goof, as she starts sleepwalking during a sleepover!

programme.title: E1 - A Day of Food, Play & Learning!
programme.desc: Join the kids for a day of food, play & learning! First, Grandma Panda bakes some cupcakes while Mia & Bari role-play as bakers in their own pretend kitchen & play a game of pat-a-cake. Then, it's time for a teddy bear's picnic with a whole variety of different tasty treats! programme.title: E1 - The Rescuers
programme.desc: Dogs around the world come to the rescue in surprising ways. Some search for survivors when disaster strikes or rescue animals from poachers and wildlife traffickers. Others help us in times of trouble—both on land and in the water.

programme.title: E2 - The Lifesavers
programme.desc: Meet a border collie that protects aircraft from lethal bird strikes, a sprocker spaniel whose sense of smell is saving imperilled water voles, and an Anatolian shepherd that helps conserve Africa’s most endangered big cat, the cheetah.

programme.title: E4 - Joined at the Hip
programme.desc: The animal kingdom can be a harsh place, but some baby animals have a family ready to take care of their needs. Meet some of these adorable babies and their clans: a koala joey, European elk twins, a litter of Asian short-clawed otters, and black howler monkey youngsters.

programme.title: E1 - The Rescuers
programme.desc: Dogs around the world come to the rescue in surprising ways. Some search for survivors when disaster strikes or rescue animals from poachers and wildlife traffickers. Others help us in times of trouble—both on land and in the water.

programme.title: E2 - The Lifesavers
programme.desc: Meet a border collie that protects aircraft from lethal bird strikes, a sprocker spaniel whose sense of smell is saving imperilled water voles, and an Anatolian shepherd that helps conserve Africa’s most endangered big cat, the cheetah.

programme.title: E5 - Badalo is Missing
programme.desc: Watch the Onçafari team get to know Aroeira, their newly collared female, and take a peek at Aurora’s cub, Apolo. Continue to track Badalo, who has moved deeper into the flooded forest, where he puts Lizzie’s game-changing research in jeopardy.

programme.title: E5 - Grasslands
programme.desc: Explore one of Earth’s most vital but overlooked habitats and learn how grasslands could slow climate change by soaking up more carbon than forests do. Meet key species, such as bison and pumas, that could restore this resource and heal our planet.

programme.title: E1 - The Rescuers

programme.title: E3 - Behind the Lens
programme.desc: Track scientists who have arrived in the Kalahari to test a hypothesis: that animal collaboration is the key to the dizzying diversity of the region’s species. Observe as they monitor behavior, decipher data, and deliver fascinating conclusions.

programme.title: E2 - The Lifesavers

programme.title: E5 - Grasslands

programme.title: E1 - A Capuchin’s Tale
programme.desc: Growing up in the rainforests in the heart of Colombia, a young capuchin monkey has to master his climbing skills, learn how to find food and learn to distinguish friend from foe.

programme.title: E2 - The Hummingbird’s Quest
programme.desc: From Colombia’s high plains of the Páramo to its tropical forests, hummingbirds have evolved into an extraordinary number of species. Whether battling freezing rain or jungle predators, each mother must struggle to build a nest, protect her eggs.

programme.title: E3 - Warriors of the Llanos
programme.desc: The flat savannas of the Colombian Llanos are governed by seasonal extremes that push life to the brink. In this unforgiving arena, there are no second chances, and only creatures best adapted to their brutal extremes will make it through a year.

programme.title: E2 - Ocean Voyagers
programme.desc: Navigate the ocean’s vast distances, depths, and darkness with nomadic sharks that thrive in the blue emptiness. Meet a lone blue shark traversing stormy Atlantic seas, and hundreds of hammerheads returning to their Pacific island breeding ground.

programme.title: E1 - Spring
programme.desc: Discover the most fantastic city of them all lying beneath the waves, where romance and migratory commuters flood the coral reef’s main highways. Follow a green sea turtle looking for love and sit in with a cassowary dad tending his newborn chicks.

programme.title: Axolotl - The Magical Healing Powers Of A Salamander
programme.desc: The axolotl, a tailed amphibian, is a marvel of evolution. It can regenerate injured body parts and is exceptionally long-lived. However, the axolotl is only found in Mexico, and its habitat is disappearing.

programme.title: Is It Still Okay To Love The King Of Pop? | Michael Jackson Explained
programme.desc: Michael Jackson: One of the most influential artists of all time. A musical genius, cultural icon and the undisputed King of Pop. Yet that legacy comes with controversy, allegations and unanswered questions.

programme.title: Best Of DW Podcasts
programme.desc: Select DW podcasts enrich the program with current analyses of world politics and its influence on our daily lives. There will also be space in the program for lively discussions about social standards and taboos.

programme.title: My Body, My Heart
programme.desc: The heart is the most unusual muscle in our body. It works tirelessly, begins beating in the womb and can even continue functioning when the brain fails. Yet, when we're young, we barely pay any attention to it.

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 在福建小島漁村長大的段宇成夢想成為一名跳高運動員，在助教羅娜的循序善誘之下，不僅訓練成績突飛猛進，兩人也在朝夕相處過程中情愫悄悄滋生，最終段宇成突破了極限也同時收穫了和羅娜的真摯愛情。

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 在福建小島漁村長大的段宇成夢想成為一名跳高運動員，在助教羅娜的循序善誘之下，不僅訓練成績突飛猛進，兩人也在朝夕相處過程中情愫悄悄滋生，最終段宇成突破了極限也同時收穫了和羅娜的真摯愛情。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: The Monkey King 3
programme.desc: On the conflict-packed journey to the West for the scriptures, escorted by Sun, Bajie and Sha, Xuanzang, the Tang Priest, accidentally enters the Womanland of Western Liang, a mysterious nation where no men has ever been existed. The Queen falls for Xuanzang at first sight, without knowing what love is, thinking she could be terminally ill with incurable lovesickness. The Preceptor warns her that men are all poisonous creatures and orders to kill Xuanzang and his disciples. With the help of the Queen, the four flee the execution site, but later Xuanzang, Bajie and Sha carelessly drink the water from the Motherhood River that makes them pregnant rapidly. Wukong tries to save the three with his almighty transforming sorcery, when Xuanzang gradually loses his stand to falls in love with the Queen. The trespass of the four outsiders also agitates the God of River Oblivion, who completely breaks the peace of the Womanland. The River God floods the whole nation in a fury and puts i

programme.title: Trapped
programme.desc: The year is 1995. Mangya, a northwestern border town of China has become a ghost town since the once-prosperous mine and border trades shut down. The town has become an island, isolated from the outside world. There is only one police station with three police officers and one gun. XIA Ran, a retired soldier has spent over a decade here. There's a saying that he's the last survivor of the battlefield but he never talk about his story. Sandstorms hit the town once a year, and a catastrophic, once-in-decade sandstorm is forecasted for this year. The storm looms on the horizon; the final transport out of town has long left. In the dead of night, five corpses are tossed into the oil tank in the town's sole gas station. The piercing silence is interrupted by a pack of uninvited guests. However, what frightens XIA Ran more than the murders is that the gas station's tank has been emptied and the town's phone line has been severed. As the sandstorm closes in on Mangya, he realizes th

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E277 -Cold War
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: DAY OFF
programme.desc: For forty years A-Rui has been running a barbershop, a small place where she has seen happiness and sorrow, ebb and flow. Faced with all the troubles in her life, A-Rui fully commits to her work and defeat is never an option for her, but her children never appreciate it and treat her profession with disdain. One day, A-Rui receives a phone call from the family of an old regular client who moved far away a long time ago. The family asks A-Rui if she would be willing to travel to cut the hair for the bedridden old man. Reminded of what her master taught her, “Always provide your best service,” A-Rui decides to hang up the “Day Off” sign and closes her shop for one day. She drives her beat-up old car and embarks on a long journey to do something others think is not worthwhile.

programme.desc: The team goes on a series of epic quests in order to create the world's perfect sandwich.

programme.desc: Mordecai becomes extremely jealous when Rigby manages to get a date with Margaret. Mordecai tries to prevent Rigby from getting to his date on time by destroying all the clocks they have.

programme.desc: Gumball is running for School President and is looking for a worthy running mate. When he asks his girlfriend Penny, he does not get the answer he expects. Featuring hilarious clips from the first six seasons of ‘The Amazing World of Gumball’.

The Feast of Fools
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, life may be tough, but having fun is also on the agenda! Folly Festival is a carnival where everyone sings and dances, but also has fun trading places. Howler becomes a princess for the day, and Little Lewis a lord.

programme.title: Hygiene in The Middle Ages
programme.desc: Howler isn't exactly a paragon of cleanliness! But seeing as he's got a soft spot for Dove, he needs to step up the hygiene if he wants to win her heart! So he introduces us to various medieval hygiene techniques.

programme.title: The Wonders of DNA
programme.desc: Why do you look so much like your siblings? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of genetics. Have hands-on fun by extracting some of your DNA, and get to know Joe Hin Tjio, the first person to find the exact number of chromosomes in the human body.

programme.title: The Spice Craze
programme.desc: Spices are a hot item in the Middle Ages! Lord Roach just can't get enough of the stuff! If you can't find the spice you want at the local market stall, it's probably on the other side of the world! And so off goes Little Lewis.

programme.title: The Spring
programme.desc: The well in the woods needs cleaning and protection from an unknown vandal.

programme.title: Trip to Japan
programme.desc: Alim finds Zoe and Milo in a messy pancake-making scene. They laugh when asked if school teaches cleaning. Alim takes them to Japan, where Akiko shows that students not only study but also take turns cleaning and helping in the canteen.

programme.title: How do plants eat and drink?
programme.desc: How can we prove plants and flowers drink water? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of botany. Have hands-on fun by making a rainbow-coloured flower, and get to know J.C. Bose, an amazing polymath who pioneered studies into the nature of plants.

programme.title: Seeking Asylum
programme.desc: Upon realising someone is following them, the gang needs to find a creative way to escape the church while decoding the next clue. Kelly is thrilled she is witnessing history in the making while Raign discovers secrets about Joy and her sister.

programme.title: Poconos
programme.desc: Pocono Mountains adventure: Zipped through Camelback Mountain, segway hike, tested wilderness survival skills, and tried wakeboarding at Lake Harmony. Packed week in the scenic outdoors!

programme.title: The Spring
programme.desc: The well in the woods needs cleaning and protection from an unknown vandal.

programme.title: Hygiene in The Middle Ages

programme.title: Atlantic Puffin
programme.desc: Franky thinks the puffins on TV must be robots, and Tiny Owl worries that he might not be the cutest critter in town anymore as Mommy and Daddy fall in love with the puffins on TV. Grandad Badger tells Binah about the time he was a circus clown.

programme.title: The Spice Craze
programme.desc: Spices are a hot item in the Middle Ages! Lord Roach just can't get enough of the stuff! If you can't find the spice you want at the local market stall, it's probably on the other side of the world! And so off goes Little Lewis.

programme.title: Trip to Japan
programme.desc: Alim finds Zoe and Milo in a messy pancake-making scene. They laugh when asked if school teaches cleaning. Alim takes them to Japan, where Akiko shows that students not only study but also take turns cleaning and helping in the canteen.

programme.title: How do plants eat and drink?

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Ester
programme.desc: As head of the aquarium, Ester sets a pace that's hard to keep up with - especially on her Segway! And when a normal day includes alligators, zebra sharks, jellyfish and shark pods, you may need a Segway to keep up with this Spanish dynamo too!

programme.title: A Strange Trial
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, animals are considered responsible for their actions and must answer to their crimes in a court of law! A crazy trial takes place, with Howler as the animals' attorney and Roach as the judge and persecutor.

programme.title: Mystery of the Reluctant Racer
programme.desc: Addison and Alex's record-setting soap box derby car seems like a shoe-in to win the annual race – until something or someone makes it mysteriously slow down to a crawl. Has it been sabotaged? Addison only has an hour till race time to solve the mystery!

programme.title: Day of the Hair
programme.desc: After Ricky orders an anti-baldness potion, things get hairy and scary as hair grows everywhere. Ricky makes a paper wig and a shaving foam painting inspired by Vincent van Gogh. Ricky and Gav eventually head to the hairdressers.

programme.title: Hogie Goes to Hong Kong
programme.desc: The gang goes to celebrate the Chinese New Year in Hong Kong and meets Bo, who is incredibly worried that he has lost his good luck. They try all sorts of traditions and superstitions to help him find his luck, but Hogie has another idea that might help him out.

programme.title: Kenji's Monster
programme.desc: A giant creature is walking across the ocean floor, causing destruction. How can something like this exist? And how can it be stopped?

programme.title: The Feast of Fools
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, life may be tough, but having fun is also on the agenda! Folly Festival is a carnival where everyone sings and dances, but also has fun trading places. Howler becomes a princess for the day, and Little Lewis a lord.

programme.title: Hygiene in The Middle Ages
programme.desc: Howler isn't exactly a paragon of cleanliness! But seeing as he's got a soft spot for Dove, he needs to step up the hygiene if he wants to win her heart! So he introduces us to various medieval hygiene techniques.

programme.title: Looking for Miniscule Microbes
programme.desc: How can microbes be of use at a birthday party? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of microorganisms. Have hands-on fun by experimenting with yeast, and get to know Satoshi Omura, a biochemist, who discovered medicine inside miniscule microbes.

programme.title: Reuse Plastic Bottles
programme.desc: With so many plastic bottles in the kitchen, the Grimwades decide to go green and do something about it.

programme.title: Let's Talk About Cancer
programme.desc: The doctors talk about cancer, explaining what it is, why people get it, how it can be treated, and how to help someone going through it.

programme.title: The Firefighter (Sabrina Cohen-Hatton) and The Bionic Man (Mark Ormrod)
programme.desc: In this episode of Bear Grylls' Becoming Xtraordinary, Sabrina Cohen-Hatton, the most senior ranking firefighter in the UK, and Mark Ormrod, triple amputee and four-time Invictus Games gold medallist, share their incredible stories of resilience.

programme.desc: In this episode of Bear Grylls' Becoming Xtraordinary, Sabrina Cohen-Hatton, the most senior ranking firefighter in the UK, and Mark Ormrod, triple amputee and four-time Invictus Games gold medallist, share their incredible stories of resilience.

programme.title: Mystery of the Reluctant Racer
programme.desc: Addison and Alex's record-setting soap box derby car seems like a shoe-in to win the annual race – until something or someone makes it mysteriously slow down to a crawl. Has it been sabotaged? Addison only has an hour till race time to solve the mystery!

programme.title: The Spice Craze
programme.desc: Spices are a hot item in the Middle Ages! Lord Roach just can't get enough of the stuff! If you can't find the spice you want at the local market stall, it's probably on the other side of the world! And so off goes Little Lewis.

programme.title: The Feast of Fools
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, life may be tough, but having fun is also on the agenda! Folly Festival is a carnival where everyone sings and dances, but also has fun trading places. Howler becomes a princess for the day, and Little Lewis a lord.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Ester
programme.desc: As head of the aquarium, Ester sets a pace that's hard to keep up with - especially on her Segway! And when a normal day includes alligators, zebra sharks, jellyfish and shark pods, you may need a Segway to keep up with this Spanish dynamo too!

programme.title: Hygiene in The Middle Ages
programme.desc: Howler isn't exactly a paragon of cleanliness! But seeing as he's got a soft spot for Dove, he needs to step up the hygiene if he wants to win her heart! So he introduces us to various medieval hygiene techniques.

programme.title: The Firefighter (Sabrina Cohen-Hatton) and The Bionic Man (Mark Ormrod)
programme.desc: In this episode of Bear Grylls' Becoming Xtraordinary, Sabrina Cohen-Hatton, the most senior ranking firefighter in the UK, and Mark Ormrod, triple amputee and four-time Invictus Games gold medallist, share their incredible stories of resilience.

programme.title: The Feast of Fools
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, life may be tough, but having fun is also on the agenda! Folly Festival is a carnival where everyone sings and dances, but also has fun trading places. Howler becomes a princess for the day, and Little Lewis a lord.

programme.title: Hygiene in The Middle Ages
programme.desc: Howler isn't exactly a paragon of cleanliness! But seeing as he's got a soft spot for Dove, he needs to step up the hygiene if he wants to win her heart! So he introduces us to various medieval hygiene techniques.

Malaysian NSL '26 E17 -KL Wildcats v Pahang Tulips
Radyo Patrol Balita
programme.desc: Teleradyo Program

programme.title: Blood Vs. Duty[Live]
programme.desc: Two brothers separated in a maritime tragedy grow up on opposite sides of the law - one a dedicated Intelligence Officer, the other fiercely protective of the Tausug family that raised him. When a corruption case pits them against each other, their long-buried secret threatens to ignite a war between blood and loyalty.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: E40 - Chili For Maria
programme.desc: Rachael turns on the heat and shows how to prepare her sister's favourite meal, a chilli recipe made with black beans, chopped meat, spices and topped with a blend of cheeses.

programme.title: E1 - Smoked Turkey Dinner
programme.desc: Gather around the table and prepare to give thanks! Rachael shows how to make a tender and crispy smoked turkey, seasoned with herbs and spices and served with chestnut and sausage stuffing.

programme.title: Little Girl In The Window
programme.desc: When amateur photographer Iris notices 'HELP' scrawled on a dusty window in a picture she took of a house, she becomes increasingly convinced that the man living there isn't as mild-mannered as he seems.

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: Today the Judges each demonstrate a microwave hack and task our contestants with creating an immunity winning dish incorporating one of them. Boundaries are pushed in a very creative cook.

programme.title: E3 - Johanna Tordjman (Algeria/Tunisia)
programme.desc: A French artist of Algerian and Tunisian origins, it was the death of her grandmother that triggered her artistic gesture. Johanna Tordjman had to paint in order not to forget. Drawing on photographic archives, she chose to tell, through brushstrokes, the stories of heritage, immigration and the invisible memories of contemporary France.

programme.title: E6 - Vesunna/Wendy Andreu/Alainpaul
programme.desc: A 4,000 square metre domus at the Vesunna Gallo-Roman Museum in Perigueux. Wendy Andreu structures each material with the same interest in creating unique objects. AlainPaul invites himself into a dance dressing room where clothes stretch and float. Jerome Clochard restores mosaics in Brittany.

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 講述失去笑容的朝鮮王世子，擁有冷峻氣質與壓倒性的氣場，背負着喪失摯愛與朝廷鬥爭的傷痛。以及樂觀開朗的女攤販，雖然失去部分過去記憶，仍堅強面對生活。在某日二人意外靈魂互換，進而展開對自身與他人命運的重新審視，並因靈魂互換而展開浪漫奇幻愛情故事。

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: 講述一位懷抱著成為名作家夢想的志願生，雖然父親期望他成為像「尹東柱」這樣的劃時代詩人而取名，但現實是只有一身債務的作家志願生陸東柱，和來歷不明、有著特殊能力的少年姜山超越時間的界限一起尋找真相並創造奇蹟的過程。

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: E54
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E4 - 小朱夏侯甜蜜約會
programme.desc: 由伊能靜、黃聖依、朱正廷、金子涵、戴燕妮、張純燁6位常駐戀愛觀察員、微反應專家姜振宇以及鄭爽組成「戀愛觀察團」，見證素人嘉賓們從素不相識到牽手成功的浪漫愛情故事。

programme.title: E54
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E4 - 小朱夏侯甜蜜約會
programme.desc: 由伊能靜、黃聖依、朱正廷、金子涵、戴燕妮、張純燁6位常駐戀愛觀察員、微反應專家姜振宇以及鄭爽組成「戀愛觀察團」，見證素人嘉賓們從素不相識到牽手成功的浪漫愛情故事。

programme.title: E12 - 收官之旅 不說再見 (下)
programme.desc: 首檔原創音樂創演節目，邀請了薛之謙、張靚穎、周深、單依純、黃子弘凡等歌手，同時更邀請小柯、方文山、黃國倫等樂壇前輩和眾多新生代原創音樂人加盟；由歌曲爭奪戰、首演舞台兩大核心環節組成，用一場歌手與歌曲的奇遇，為他們提供一個自由共創的舞台，打造華語樂壇新的高光時刻。

programme.title: E11 - 吉克雋逸凡希亞王炸來襲
programme.desc: 突破傳統音樂綜藝節目模式，創新性地將舞台設立在郵輪上，從中國上海啟航，途經沖繩、越南、新加坡、馬來西亞，最終抵達香港；吸納數百名來自亞洲各國的00後新銳唱將，他們將在Jessie J、張靚穎、張信哲、尤長靖所組成的「新聲團」，及近百位亞洲各國音樂人的見證下，開啟一次巡迴亞洲的音樂競演！

programme.title: E54
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。
